content: {"id":"fb_1782069271148_1ei6wh","signal":"positive","context":"Fixed tools/tmobile-antenna-optimize.js to support 5G Standalone (no 4G/LTE telemetry returned). Debugged user's Mac Pro/Mini spotty internet and pinpointed 10% packet loss and 730ms latency occurring on the cellular wireless hop (Hop 2 to Hop 3) rather than Wi-Fi interface (Hop 1 is 3ms). RSRP of -100 to -102 and SINR 9-12 with 4G unavailable suggests uplink starvation, poor antenna alignment, or port mismatch.","submittedContext":"Fixed tools/tmobile-antenna-optimize.js to support 5G Standalone (no 4G/LTE telemetry returned).
